arm_authorship.control: independent blind subagent (agent alone, no Twin), given only neutral briefs, forbidden from reading any answer-key/mapping/score file
arm_authorship.treatment: independent blind subagent (agent + MVR Twin beta.31, live kernel), given only neutral briefs, forbidden from reading any answer-key/mapping/score file
arm_authorship.orchestrator: did NOT author either arm; held the key and scored only

blinding: cases relabeled to shuffled neutral ids (c01..c12); category/verdict never exposed to arms; mapping kept private

results.judge: third independent blind subagent; verdicts in _judge_verdicts.json
results.edge_concentration: eclipse (ECL-1/2), demand-illusion (DEM-1/2), calibration-honesty (UNCAL-1/2); ties on named-regulation, unit-econ, clean
